message:
chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs from latest local suite run (round 4)

Fourth pass of artifact regeneration on top of the F32 BatchTrace
fast-path commit. Same shape as the prior three "chore(artifacts):
refresh e2e/CI/test logs ..." commits — pure timestamp/duration
churn with no schema, status, or pass/fail diffs:

- artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json — generated_at_unix_ms / ts_utc_unix_ms /
  duration_ms only.
- artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/gj_*.golden.json — ts_utc_unix_ms only.
- artifacts/testing/logs/{fj-core, fj-interpreters, fj-trace,
  fj-conformance, fj-ad, fj-dispatch}/*.json — per-test timestamps.
- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json — run_id /
  started_at / finished_at / per-gate timestamps.

(The two artifact files actually exercising the new F32 path —
e2e_vmap_tensor_ops.e2e.json and e2e_vmap_tensor_ops_oracle.json —
were already bundled into the implementation commit, so this batch
holds only unrelated suite reruns.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
